title: Deprea sawyeriana
taxonomy: Deprea sawyeriana is classified in the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the nightshade family. This plant belongs to the genus Deprea, which is a group of flowering plants native to the Americas. Deprea sawyeriana is further classified into the tribe Solaneae, which includes various species of plants that produce showy flowers. The classification of Deprea sawyeriana is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its flower structure and leaf shape. As a member of the Solanaceae family, Deprea sawyeriana shares similarities with other plants that have similar growth habits and flowering patterns.
